description: Examines the causes of terrorism, goals and strategies pursued by terrorist groups, the consequences of terrorism, and counterterrorism policies adopted by governments. Not open to students with credit for POLI SCI 319 prior to fall 2017

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Sophomore standing and (POLI SCI 104,120,140,182,184,INTL ST 101orLEGAL ST/​POLI SCI  217) or (POLI SCI 103, 106, or 186 taken prior to fall 2017) or graduate standing
